name: tabs-demo
visual_summary: Tabs-demo is a responsive UI component that displays a set of content sections with tabs. It is useful for developers who want to provide users with a simple way to switch between different sections of information. This component can be used in various situations, such as in navigation bars or within content pages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready tabs component with the following characteristics:

Name: tabs-demo
Description: Tabs-demo is a responsive UI component that displays a set of content sections with tabs. It is useful for developers who want to provide users with a simple way to switch between different sections of information. This component can be used in various situations, such as in navigation bars or within content pages.
Style: e.g. material, e.g. material-dark
Interactions: e.g. scrollable, e.g. animated-switch
Tags: tabs, content, switcher, navigation, responsive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
